name: Hoax.ai Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Governance Policy
governing_principle: Prototype governance defines what may be built later. It must not build it now.
static_boundary_principle: A non-public prototype may explore interface form, but it must not create operational capability.
non_public_definition: Not linked from the public site, not included in sitemap.xml, not registered as a public route, not exposed as a public product, not presented as a workbench launch, and not treated as an engine or classifier. Repository-visible but non-public as a web surface and non-operational as a system.
prototype_non_purpose: This governance sprint does not create prototype files, prototype directory, interface, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, routes, sitemap entries, or public tool behavior.

non_authorization_rules.statement: Prototype governance does not authorize prototype implementation, interface implementation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or public tool behavior.
